problem id: ae93aec4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND SHL(7)) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01010010 -> 00101001
  01100011 -> 00110001
  01111111 -> 10111111
  01011011 -> 00101101
  01011100 -> 00101110
  00001111 -> 10000111
  11111101 -> 11111110
  00111101 -> 10011110
  10101001 -> 01010100
  00101101 -> 10010110

query: 00110000
predicted answer: 00011000
